General.Name: EuroEyes International Eye Clinic Ltd
General.Description: EuroEyes International Eye Clinic Limited provides vision correction services in Germany, the People's Republic of China, Denmark, and the United Kingdom. The company offers laser eye surgery in various options, including SMILE Pro, Femto-Lasik, PRK, and Lasek; refractive laser surgery, such as ReLEx SMILE, Femto LASIK, and Presbyond; lens exchange surgery comprising monofocal and trifocal lens exchange surgery; and PRK/LASEK and ICRS implantation services. It also sells pharmaceutical products; rental of ophthalmic equipment and operating spaces; and provides training service. In addition, the company is involved in the operation of consultation centers and/or clinics for eye treatment, as well as LASIK centers; and trading of eye clinic equipment and lenses. EuroEyes International Eye Clinic Limited was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Hamburg, Germany.
